title: Kahi Suni
subTitle: Host Sara Khan travels the Indian sub-continent to explore established myths and legends, to decode them and discover their origin and the reasons they are prevalent.

title: Regiment Diaries
subTitle: The host provides insights into the various regiments of the Indian army, their training, traditions, history, contributions and how a civilian becomes a soldier.

title: Lost Recipes
subTitle: The host travels across different regions of India to revive and popularise deeply traditional recipes that are forgotten.

title: Safarnama
subTitle: Ankit Siwach visits some of the unexplored destinations in India and provides an insight into their culture, heritage, cuisine and natural beauty.

title: Odd Jobs
subTitle: Discover unique and unconventional professions across India, showcasing the dedication, skill and passion of individuals in extraordinary lines of work.

title: Mid Wicket Tales
subTitle: Naseeruddin Shah recalls some of the most memorable moments in cricket and interacts with former cricketers, who share their experiences and journeys.

title: The Way Back Home
subTitle: Rohan Thakur embarks on a journey across the Himalayan ranges, exploring the diverse landscape and culture of the region.

title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
subTitle: A renowned Indian chef shares the recipes of a variety of mouthwatering dishes and demonstrates the steps involved in their preparation.

subTitle: The presenter sheds light on the rich history, sacred customs and religious significance of some of India's most magnificent temples.
